title: KC Soma Annotations in Neuroglancer
code: kcs <- aedes_meta("class:KC") kcsp <- aedes_soma_position(kcs$root_id, cl = 4) kcsp %>% count(source)

what: Add Soma Annotations to a Scene
title: KC Soma Annotations in Neuroglancer
text: positions returned aedes_soma_position() nm coordinates default, ngl_annotation_layers() use rawcoords = FALSE. Use with_aedes() making annotation layers fafbseg uses Aedes Neuroglancer context, obtain correct voxel dimensions. resulting scene separate annotation layers soma source, source-specific colours: ask raw voxel coordinates instead, create kcsp units = "raw" set rawcoords <- TRUE calling ngl_annotation_layers().
code: singletonurl <- "https://spelunker.cave-explorer.org/#!middleauth+https://global.daf-apis.com/nglstate/api/v1/4738104991678464" rawcoords <- FALSE  kc_ann <- kcsp %>%   filter(!is.na(position)) %>%   transmute(     point = position,     segments = as.character(root_id),     layer = paste0("KC soma: ", source)   ) kc_cols <- setNames(rainbow(n_distinct(kc_ann$layer)), unique(kc_ann$layer))  with_aedes({   kc_scene <- ngl_decode_scene(singletonurl) +     ngl_annotation_layers(kc_ann, rawcoords = rawcoords, colpal = kc_cols) }) kcurl=ngl_encode_url(kc_scene) browseURL(kcurl)

what: Support Access to the Aedes Connectome Dataset
title: Support Access to the Aedes Connectome Dataset
text: aedes package provides programmatic access progress Aedes aegypti connectome dataset. integrates coconatfly wider natverse ecosystem. recommend use coconatfly package possible order ensure uniform experience across different insect connectome datasets sophisticated box analyses. Note dataset still early state proofreading annotation access currently limited pre-release testing phase develop robust community infrastructure.

title: Support Access to the Aedes Connectome Dataset
text: package delivered thin wrapper around fafbseg optional registration coconatfly. familiar users fancr bancr packages. CAVE package must access appropriate token recorded. Metadata project stored seatable web-accessible database accessed via fafbseg::flytable_* functions wrapped package. CAVE datasets concept active materialisation version defines state segmentation used analysis. Alternatively timestamp can specified allow exact point time used.

title: Support Access to the Aedes Connectome Dataset
text: package must installed github: also need additional one time setup. Access segmentation / connectivity information via CAVE. use python CAVE client hood must installed via simple_python(). Authentication via token, typically shared across CAVE projects (e.g. flywire, FANC, BANC etc). can make new one linked email address authorised access web resources via neuroglancer. order start using flytable, must get API token. doesn’t seem convenient way seatable web interface can get one calling flytable_set_token() flytable user password. step. Thereafter FLYTABLE_TOKEN environment variable set .Renviron file.
code: if (!requireNamespace("natmanager", quietly = TRUE)) {   install.packages("natmanager") } natmanager::install(pkgs = "flyconnectome/aedes") # required  fafbseg::simple_python()  # Will open browser to get new token fafbseg::flywire_set_token() # Writes a known token to correct location fafbseg::flywire_set_token("2f88e16c4f21bfcb290b2a8288c05bd0")  fafbseg::flytable_set_token()

code: library(aedes) library(coconatfly)  # once per session register_aedes_coconat()

title: Support Access to the Aedes Connectome Dataset
text: Select smaller set PN neurons type matching G2X Now can cluster connectivity. depends partner neurons kind identity recorded, typically via type column (default) numeric group column (often set even formal type proposed). time writing PN input partners (ORNs) well typed downstream partners less . let’s just use input partners also restrict neurons already typed n=2 neurons type small plot.  wealth options clustering. can select input partners using group column rather type defining neuron-type connectivity matrix. can turn partner grouping (can actually work better circumstances limited partner type information available) able co-cluster L R homologues. default threshold setting 5 synapse may little restrictive dataset synapses counts seem low (even without considering proofreading).
code: library(dplyr)  # 1) List neurons with class ALPN alpn_meta <- cf_meta(cf_ids(aedes = "/class:ALPN")) alpn_meta %>% count(subclass, subsubclass) #>   subclass subsubclass   n #> 1     ALPN      BI_MUL  21 #> 2     ALPN      BI_UNI   8 #> 3     ALPN      II_MUL 214 #> 4     ALPN      II_UNI 329 #> 5     ALPN        <NA>   1 gpn_ids <- cf_meta(cf_ids(aedes = "/type:G2[0-9].*PN")) #> Updating 73 ids gpn_meta <- cf_meta(gpn_ids) #> Updating 73 ids gpn_meta %>% count(type, side) %>% tidyr::spread(side, n) #>        type L  R #> 1   G20_lPN 2  2 #> 2   G21_lPN 3  3 #> 3  G22_adPN 1  1 #> 4   G23_lPN 3  3 #> 5   G24_lPN 2  2 #> 6   G25_lPN 1  1 #> 7   G26_lPN 1  1 #> 8  G27_adPN 1  1 #> 9  G28_adPN 1  1 #> 10 G29_adPN 1  1 #> 11 G29_lvPN 1 NA gpn_meta %>%    add_count(type) %>%    filter(n==2) %>%    cf_cosine_plot(partners = 'in') #> Updating 73 ids #> Updating 73 ids #> Warning in coconat::partner_summary2adjacency_matrix(x[["inputs"]], inputcol = #> groupcol, : Dropping: 942/1323 neurons representing 12328/27228 synapses due to #> missing ids! #> Updating 73 ids cf_cosine_plot(gpn_ids, heatmap = T, partners = 'in') cf_cosine_plot(gpn_ids, heatmap = T, partners = 'in', group = 'group') cf_cosine_plot(gpn_ids, heatmap = T, partners = 'in', group = FALSE) cf_cosine_plot(gpn_ids, heatmap = T, partners = 'in', group = FALSE, threshold = 2) #> Updating 73 ids #> Updating 73 ids #> Warning in fafbseg::cam_meta(ids = ids, ignore.case = ignore.case, fixed = fixed, : Dropping 1 rows containing duplicate root_ids! #> You can inspect all 2 rows with duplicate ids by doing: #> attr(df, 'duprows') #> on your returned data frame (replacing df as appropriate). #> Updating 73 ids

title: Query Aedes tables in the CAVE annotation system — aedes_cave_query
code: aedes_cave_query(   table,   datastack_name = NULL,   version = NULL,   timestamp = NULL,   live = is.null(version),   timetravel = FALSE,   filter_in_dict = NULL,   filter_out_dict = NULL,   filter_regex_dict = NULL,   select_columns = NULL,   offset = 0L,   limit = NULL,   fetch_all_rows = FALSE,   ... )

title: Query Aedes tables in the CAVE annotation system — aedes_cave_query
text: table Table name. datastack_name Optional datastack name. Defaults active Aedes datastack. version optional CAVE materialisation version number. See details examples. timestamp optional timestamp string POSIXct, interpreted UTC timezone specified. live Whether use live query mode, updates root ids current value (another timestamp provided). Values TRUE 1 select CAVE's Live mode, 2 selects Live live mode gives access even annotations part materialisation version. See section Live Live Live queries details. timetravel Whether interpret version/timestamp defined point past latest annotations sent back time, recalculating root ids necessary. filter_in_dict, filter_out_dict, filter_regex_dict Optional arguments consisting key value lists restrict returned rows (keeping matches filtering matches). Commonly used selected rows specific neurons. See examples CAVE documentation details. select_columns Either character vector naming columns python dict (required query involves multiple tables). offset 0-indexed row number, allows page long results (see section CAVE Row Limits caveats) limit whether limit number rows per query (NULL implies client side limit typically server side limit 500,000 rows). fetch_all_rows Whether fetch rows query exceeds limit (default FALSE). See section CAVE Row Limits caveats. ... Additional arguments passed fafbseg::flywire_cave_query().

title: Animate Aedes proofreading edits as a gif — aedes_edit_movie

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Fetch edit operations and add user metadata ops <- aedes:::aedes_all_operations(compute_centroids=TRUE) user_info <- googlesheets4::read_sheet(   "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1W0CLjIvgX9rl4ttqgjI3xr3zlL_hA86ZRW0-3-CGQTU/" ) edit_dat <- ops %>% dplyr::left_join(user_info, by = c("user" = "user_id"))  # All edits with rotation aedes_edit_movie(edit_dat, name = "all_edits", rotate = TRUE)  # Human edits only edit_dat %>%   dplyr::filter(user_affiliation != "auto") %>%   aedes_edit_movie(name = "human_edits") } # }

"landmarks" uses paired landmarks original Aedes space. units Coordinate units x returned object. symmetric registration defined microns; nm inputs scaled transformation. subset Optional subset passed nat::xform(), example transforming selected elements neuronlist. landmarks Optional landmark data pointA pointB entries. NULL, landmarks read url using fafbseg::ngl_annotations(). raw Whether landmark coordinates raw voxel space. FALSE, landmark coordinates assumed units. url Neuroglancer URL containing paired mirror landmarks. vd Optional voxel dimensions nm. Advanced use; NULL raw = TRUE, detected automatically. ... Additional arguments passed nat::xform().

what: Population L2-attribute model for soma identification — aedes_soma_l2_stats
title: Population L2-attribute model for soma identification — aedes_soma_l2_stats
text: Statistics learned KC-based training set, used aedes_soma_position() (cascade falls "l2+mesh" / "l2" / "mesh") score soma-like L2 chunk neuron .

title: Population L2-attribute model for soma identification — aedes_soma_l2_stats
code: aedes_soma_l2_stats

title: Population L2-attribute model for soma identification — aedes_soma_l2_stats
text: list elements: feature_names Character vector 5 shape features used Mahalanobis distance. feature_transforms Named list documenting raw -> feature transforms (mostly log1p). positive_mean, positive_cov Mean vector covariance matrix positive (KC) training set feature space. positive_quantiles Per-feature P5..P95 quantiles diagnostics. dist_npil_density List x (um grid), y (mixed density), y_max, support, uniform_density, uniform_eps, n – KDE prior signed neuropil distance. dist_penalty_weight Multiplier distance-penalty term. n_positive, n_negative Training set sizes. training_set Provenance positives / negatives / distance prior. build_date Date dataset built.

title: Population L2-attribute model for soma identification — aedes_soma_l2_stats
text: score combines two terms: shape Squared Mahalanobis distance L2 chunk's five shape features (log_area_nm2, log_size_nm3, log_max_dt_nm, log_mean_dt_nm, roundness = pca_val_2 / pca_val_0) versus KC positive population (positive_mean, positive_cov). Smaller = closer typical KC soma. dist_npil penalty -2 * log(f_hat(d_um) / max(f_hat)) f_hat empirical KDE signed neuropil distance full flywire_nuclei() population, mixed small uniform background value hard-rejected (real central-brain neurons sit 0-3 um inside neuropil). Weight controlled dist_penalty_weight. Combined soma_score = mahal_shape + dist_penalty_weight * dist_penalty (lower = soma-like).

what: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
title: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
text: Returns recorded soma position (nm) input root id, using FlyTable annotations /FlyWire nucleus segmentation.

title: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
code: aedes_soma_position(   ids,   method = c("auto", "flytable", "nucleus", "l2+mesh", "l2", "mesh"),   units = c("nm", "raw"),   nuclei = c("largest", "all"),   mesh = aedes::aedes_neuropil_mesh,   chunksize = 20L,   cl = NULL,   version = NULL,   timestamp = NULL )

title: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
text: ids Root IDs FlyTable query string accepted aedes_ids(). method One "auto", "flytable", "nucleus", "l2+mesh", "l2", "mesh". "auto" (default) function tries FlyTable's soma_xyz first, falls back fafbseg::flywire_nuclei() neuron without recorded soma, – mesh available – finally falls back combined L2-attribute + neuropil signed-distance score ("l2+mesh"). Restricting method skips cascade. "l2" uses L2 shape features (area, distance transform, roundness, size); "mesh" uses signed distance errors mesh = NULL. units Units returned coordinates: "nm" (default) "raw" voxel coordinates. FlyTable's soma_xyz always stored raw voxel coordinates converted nm via aedes_raw2nm() returned (unless units = "raw"). nuclei handle root ids one distinct-position nucleus nucleus segmentation. "largest" (default) returns one row per input id, picking nucleus largest volume (first row volume column available). "" returns every candidate row, ambiguous root id contributes one row. Either way, bookkeeping duplicates (rows identical position root id) silently collapsed, n_nuclei records many distinct-position candidates considered. mesh mesh3d neuropil mesh-based scoring methods. Defaults aedes_neuropil_mesh. Pass NULL disable mesh-based fallback "auto". chunksize Number neurons per batched L2-attribute fetch cascade reaches "l2+mesh" / "l2" / "mesh". Larger values reduce CAVE round-trip overhead cost larger responses. Default 20 trades well practice; pass 1L revert per-neuron fetches. cl Optional parallel cluster (integer worker count) passed pbapply::pblapply() chunk processing. NULL (default) runs sequentially progress bar. Useful scoring hundreds thousands neurons via L2. version, timestamp Optional CAVE materialisation selectors passed aedes_meta() fafbseg::flywire_nuclei(). Defaults timestamp='now' user supplied selector.

title: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
text: data.frame columns root_id; position ("x,y,z" string requested units; convert back nat::xyzmatrix()); source ("flytable", "nucleus", "l2+mesh", "l2", "mesh", NA); n_nuclei (number distinct-position nucleus candidates root id, NA soma came elsewhere / found); nucleus_id (nuclei_v1_aedes primary key, FlyTable source = "flytable" chosen nucleus row source = "nucleus"). L2-derived rows also include soma_score (absolute, cross-neuron-comparable; squared Mahalanobis distance chunk's shape features KC positive cloud, plus KDE-based penalty signed neuropil distance – lower = soma-like; see aedes_soma_l2_stats), dist_npil_nm (signed distance neuropil mesh, nm; positive inside, negative outside – soma rows cortex usually negative), l2_id (selected L2 chunk). columns NA non-L2 sources. nuclei = "largest" one row per input id input order; nuclei = "" rows ordered input id ambiguous ids contribute multiple rows (sorted descending volume).

title: Look up the soma position for one or more Aedes neurons — aedes_soma_position
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ aedes_soma_position("class:DNa") aedes_soma_position("class:DNa", units = "raw") aedes_soma_position("648518347517945383", nuclei = "all") aedes_soma_position(c("648518347528739642", "648518347497973071"),                     method = "flytable") } # }

what: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
text: Find Aedes root supervoxel (leaf) IDs XYZ locations

title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
code: aedes_xyz2id(   xyz,   rawcoords = FALSE,   voxdims = aedes_voxdims(),   cloudvolume.url = NULL,   root = TRUE,   timestamp = NULL,   version = NULL,   stop_layer = NULL,   integer64 = FALSE,   method = c("auto", "cloudvolume", "spine"),   ... )

title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
text: xyz One xyz locations Nx3 matrix form compatible xyzmatrix including neuron mesh3d surface objects. rawcoords whether input values raw voxel indices nm voxdims voxel dimensions nm used convert raw coordinates. default value uses flywire_voxdims function identify value current segmentation (usually success). cloudvolume.url URL CloudVolume fetch segmentation image data. default value NULL chooses flywire production segmentation dataset. root Whether return root id whole segment rather supervoxel id. timestamp optional timestamp string POSIXct, interpreted UTC timezone specified. version optional CAVE materialisation version number. See details examples. stop_layer layer chunked graph stop . default NULL equivalent layer 1 full root id. Coarser layer 2 IDs can useful intermediate operations. integer64 Whether return ids integer64 type (compact little fragile) rather character (default FALSE). method Lookup method: "auto" "spine" use Aedes transform service; "cloudvolume" delegates fafbseg::flywire_xyz2id(). ... Additional arguments passed backend helpers.

title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
text: vector segment IDs (character integer64).

title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
text: Method auto (maps spine) much faster look ups many points, especially points region space.

title: Find Aedes root or supervoxel (leaf) IDs for XYZ locations — aedes_xyz2id
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ aedes_xyz2id(c(24606, 12450, 5798), rawcoords = TRUE, root = FALSE) } # }

title: Read Aedes L2 skeletons — read_aedes_neurons
text: Thin Aedes-aware wrapper around fafbseg::read_l2skel(). Optionally reroots skeleton soma, cascading configurable set methods.

title: Read Aedes L2 skeletons — read_aedes_neurons
code: read_aedes_neurons(   ids,   units = c("nm", "raw", "microns"),   reroot = TRUE,   method = c("auto", "flytable", "nucleus", "l2+mesh", "l2", "mesh", "none"),   mesh = aedes::aedes_neuropil_mesh,   chunksize = 20L,   cl = NULL,   OmitFailures = TRUE,   previous = NULL,   version = NULL,   timestamp = NULL,   ... )

title: Read Aedes L2 skeletons — read_aedes_neurons
text: ids Root IDs FlyTable query string compatible aedes_ids(). units Units returned skeletons (default "nm"). reroot Whether reroot returned neurons. method Reroot strategy passed aedes_soma_position(). "auto" (default) neuron handled first source succeeds cascade: FlyTable soma_xyz → FlyWire nucleus → "l2+mesh" (combined L2-attribute + neuropil signed-distance score neuron FlyTable nucleus soma; used mesh available). Restrict single value disable cascade. "none" skips rerooting (equivalent reroot = FALSE). mesh mesh3d neuropil. Defaults packaged aedes_neuropil_mesh. Pass NULL disable mesh-based fallback "auto"; "l2+mesh" "mesh" error without mesh. chunksize, cl Forwarded aedes_soma_position() – batch size L2 attribute fetches optional parallel cluster chunk processing. OmitFailures Passed fafbseg::read_l2skel(). previous Optional nat::neuronlist() earlier call. Neurons whose names match requested root ids reused missing skeletons read. previous expected nm coordinates. version, timestamp Optional CAVE materialisation selectors. ... Additional arguments passed fafbseg::read_l2skel().

title: Read Aedes L2 skeletons — read_aedes_neurons
text: nat::neuronlist() L2 skeletons. rerooted, neuron's data slot gains soma_source ("flytable", "nucleus", "l2+mesh", "l2", "mesh", NA), n_nuclei (count distinct-position nucleus candidates considered, NA), nucleus_id (nuclei_v1_aedes primary key chosen row, NA). n_nuclei > 1 indicates chosen nucleus one several distinct positions root id; see aedes_soma_position() full candidate list.

title: Read Aedes L2 skeletons — read_aedes_neurons
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ dns <- read_aedes_neurons("class:DNa") dns <- read_aedes_neurons("class:DNa", method = "flytable") # no fallback dns <- read_aedes_neurons("class:DNa", reroot = FALSE) } # }

title: Register Aedes dataset for coconatfly — register_aedes_coconat
text: Invisible NULL.

title: Register Aedes dataset for coconatfly — register_aedes_coconat
text: aedes dataset continually evolving. three two main choices handle . use specific numeric version (aka materialisation) segmentation. use latest materialisation version (version='latest') map ids current time (version='now') Option 2 default since can make queries somewhat faster stable note 'latest' can several days old.

title: Register Aedes dataset for coconatfly — register_aedes_coconat
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ register_aedes_coconat() cf_meta(cf_ids(aedes="/class:MBON.*")) aedes_set_version('now') cf_meta(cf_ids(aedes="/class:MBON.*")) } # }

title: aedes v0.2
text: Fast supervoxel lookups via MRC LMB transform service (aedes_xyz2id() method="auto"), > 100x faster cloudvolume bulk queries. also features chunked requests progress reporting automatic retry reduced chunk size failure. aedes_sequential_update() now uses fast transform service supervoxel lookups. aedes_meta() now wraps fafbseg::cam_meta() metadata queries, improved documentation version/timestamp handling. Refactored aedes_cfmeta() column renaming robustness. Package hygiene: removed unused imports, added glue, httr, nat.utils, pbapply Imports, pinned fafbseg (>= 0.15.5).

title: aedes v0.1
text: Initial version github basic functions 2025aedes aedes-dataset-funs.R also docs https://flyconnectome.github.io/aedes
